title: Platform Engineering Foundations
summary: Internal developer platforms as a product — paved roads, golden paths, self-service provisioning, developer experience metrics, and the org patterns (Team Topologies) that decide whether a platform team multiplies or bottlenecks every other team.

volatileChapters.reason: AI-augmented platform tooling (LLM runbooks, MCP-style agent integration) shifts faster than the rest of the book.
